name: AMT Research and Experimental Expenditure Exception

eligibility.description: Individuals who materially participate in a business activity (per section 469(h)) and incur R&D expenses.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Exempts taxpayers who materially participate in an activity from having to capitalize and amortize research/experimental expenditures over 10 years for AMT purposes.
